image:image.image:title: Pip Seymour - SEO & Content Strategy Lead, KnowHow Marketing Lab
image:image.image:caption: Pip Seymour is the founder of Seymour Digital Media and lead SEO instructor at KnowHow Marketing Lab.

image:image.image:title: Phelan Lewis - Google Ads & Analytics Lead, KnowHow Marketing Lab
image:image.image:caption: Phelan Lewis is the Google Ads and analytics lead at KnowHow Marketing Lab.

image:image.image:title: Pip Seymour - Founder, Seymour Digital Media & KnowHow Marketing Lab
image:image.image:caption: Pip Seymour has over 20 years of digital marketing agency experience specialising in data-driven SEO and content strategy.

image:image.image:title: Phelan Lewis - Google Ads & Analytics Lead, KnowHow Marketing Lab
image:image.image:caption: Phelan Lewis has managed millions of dollars in Google Ads spend across retail, professional services, healthcare, and manufacturing.

image:image.image:title: Finding Your First Keywords - KnowHow Marketing Lab
image:image.image:caption: Free SEO tutorial on keyword research for medium-sized businesses from KnowHow Marketing Lab.

image:image.image:title: Data-Driven SEO Dashboard - Google Search Console and GA4 Analytics for Medium-Sized Businesses
image:image.image:caption: Data-driven SEO analytics dashboard showing Google Search Console and GA4 metrics for a medium-sized business. From the KnowHow Marketing Lab guide to data-driven SEO.

image:image.image:title: Google Analytics 4 Setup Guide - KnowHow Marketing Lab
image:image.image:caption: Step-by-step GA4 setup tutorial for medium-sized businesses. Learn how to configure Google Analytics 4 correctly from the start.

image:image.image:title: Free SEO Course - Google Search Console Tutorial, KnowHow Marketing Lab
image:image.image:caption: Free SEO course covering Google Search Console, keyword research, on-page SEO, and content strategy for medium-sized businesses.

image:image.image:title: Pip Seymour teaches the free SEO course at KnowHow Marketing Lab
image:image.image:caption: Pip Seymour leads the free SEO course at KnowHow Marketing Lab, covering data-driven SEO, Google Search Console, and GA4.

image:image.image:title: Free Google Ads Course - Intro Class, KnowHow Marketing Lab
image:image.image:caption: Free Google Ads course covering campaign types, bidding strategies, ad groups, and performance optimisation for medium-sized businesses.

image:image.image:title: Phelan Lewis teaches the free Google Ads course at KnowHow Marketing Lab
image:image.image:caption: Phelan Lewis leads the Google Ads and analytics training at KnowHow Marketing Lab.

image:image.image:title: SEO and Analytics Coaching for Marketers - KnowHow Marketing Lab
image:image.image:caption: Marketing team in a coaching session reviewing SEO and analytics data on a laptop. From the KnowHow Marketing Lab guide to SEO and analytics coaching for marketers.

image:image.image:title: Google Ads Coaching for Small Business — What It Costs and How to Get Results
image:image.image:caption: Small business owner reviewing Google Ads performance on a laptop at their desk. From the KnowHow Marketing Lab guide to Google Ads coaching for small businesses.

image:image.image:title: Google Ads Coaching for Marketers — What to Look For and How It Works
image:image.image:caption: Marketer reviewing Google Ads performance data on a dashboard during a coaching session. From the KnowHow Marketing Lab guide to Google Ads coaching for marketers.

image:image.image:title: The KnowHow Marketing Framework - Measure, Optimise, Grow
image:image.image:caption: The KnowHow Marketing Framework: a data-driven approach to SEO, Google Ads, and digital marketing for medium-sized businesses.
